title: BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES PORTLAND BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient mental health services. Therapists work together with clients to achieve mutually agreed upon goals. Offers comprehensive psychiatric assessments as well as on-going medication management as part of mental health treatment. 11010 SE Division Street Suite 202 Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm (503) 335-5975 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 335-5975 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call intake line. Telehealth services available. FEES: Accepts Oregon Health Plan, Medicare, most private insurance plans, and sliding fee scale is available DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Abuse Counseling Child Guidance Mental Health Evaluation * Adolescents Mental Health Evaluation * Children Psychiatric Medication Services Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING APPROACHES - MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING AND PSYCHIATRY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - IN-HOME SAFETY AND REUNIFICATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING CLASSES MUTUAL SUPPORT - KEEP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
